contract_changes: Updated evidence_quality from real-world-validated to confirmed (valid enum value)
Added evidence comment blocks above query and mutate postconditions
evidence_quality remains confirmed (0 FPs in 24 tested repos)

scanner_changes: Added isInsideCallbackWrapperShell() suppression for trpc-mutate-missing-try-catch and trpc-query-missing-try-catch.

Suppresses violations where the .query()/.mutate() call is inside a callback passed to a known wrapper-shell (PromiseCall, PromiseState, safeAsync, tryCatch, withErrorBoundary, etc.) imported at file level.
fixture_changes: Added 3 SHOULD_NOT_FIRE fixtures: blinkoPromiseCallWrap, blinkoPromiseStateWrap, safeAsyncWrap.
Added 1 SHOULD_FIRE fixture: nameCollisionLocalShadow (locally-declared PromiseCall identifier, not imported — name-collision defense).
Added wrapper-stubs.ts with PromiseCall, PromiseState, safeAsync stubs modeled after blinko's app/src/store/standard/PromiseState.ts.

false_positive_check.note: Resolves §8 callback-wrapper-shell FPs at blinko (~270 violations across .query/.mutate), rybbit (66 FPs), gpt4free-ts (180 FPs).
